name: open-whispr
description: A desktop dictation application using whisper.cpp for speech-to-text transcription

scripts.compile:native: npm run compile:globe && npm run compile:fast-paste && npm run compile:winkeys && npm run compile:winpaste && npm run compile:linux-paste && npm run compile:linux-system-audio && npm run compile:text-monitor && npm run compile:media-remote && npm run compile:mic-listener && npm run compile:audio-tap
scripts.prestart: npm run compile:native && npm run download:meeting-aec-helper && npm run download:qdrant && npm run download:embedding-model
scripts.predev: npm run compile:native && npm run download:meeting-aec-helper && npm run download:qdrant && npm run download:embedding-model
scripts.predev:main: npm run compile:native && npm run download:meeting-aec-helper && npm run download:qdrant && npm run download:embedding-model
scripts.prebuild: npm run compile:native && npm run download:whisper-cpp && npm run download:llama-server && npm run download:sherpa-onnx && npm run download:qdrant && npm run download:meeting-aec-helper && npm run download:embedding-model -- --for-build && npm run download:diarization-models -- --output-dir resources/bin/diarization-models
scripts.build: cd src && vite build && cd .. && electron-builder
scripts.prebuild:mac: npm run compile:native && npm run download:whisper-cpp && npm run download:llama-server && npm run download:sherpa-onnx && npm run download:qdrant && npm run download:meeting-aec-helper && npm run download:diarization-models -- --output-dir resources/bin/diarization-models
scripts.prebuild:win: npm run compile:native && npm run download:whisper-cpp && npm run download:llama-server && npm run download:sherpa-onnx && npm run download:qdrant && npm run download:meeting-aec-helper && npm run download:diarization-models -- --output-dir resources/bin/diarization-models && npm run download:nircmd && npm run download:windows-fast-paste && npm run download:windows-key-listener && npm run download:windows-mic-listener
scripts.prebuild:linux: npm run compile:native && npm run download:whisper-cpp && npm run download:llama-server && npm run download:sherpa-onnx && npm run download:qdrant && npm run download:meeting-aec-helper && npm run download:diarization-models -- --output-dir resources/bin/diarization-models
scripts.prepack: npm run compile:native && npm run download:whisper-cpp && npm run download:llama-server && npm run download:sherpa-onnx && npm run download:qdrant && npm run download:meeting-aec-helper && npm run download:diarization-models -- --output-dir resources/bin/diarization-models
scripts.pack: npm run build:renderer && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir
scripts.predist: npm run compile:native && npm run download:whisper-cpp && npm run download:llama-server && npm run download:sherpa-onnx && npm run download:qdrant && npm run download:meeting-aec-helper && npm run download:diarization-models -- --output-dir resources/bin/diarization-models
scripts.quality-check: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck
